proposal_summary: This proposal initializes a Compound III USDC market (cUSDCv3) on Optimism. It deploys the Comet implementation, sets risk parameters, configures COMP rewards, bridges 10K USDC via CCTP to seed reserves, bridges 3.6K COMP via L1StandardBridge to seed rewards, and updates the official ENS TXT records.

disclosed_entities.name: Timelock
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: take the Timelock's USDC on Mainnet

disclosed_entities.name: USDC
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: take the Timelock's USDC on Mainnet

disclosed_entities.name: Comet implementation
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: deploys a new Comet implementation on Optimism

disclosed_entities.name: governance receiver on Optimism
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: across the bridge to the governance receiver on Optimism

disclosed_entities.name: v3-additional-grants.compound-community-licenses.eth
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: updates the ENS TXT record v3-official-markets on v3-additional-grants.compound-community-licenses.eth

claimed_actions.raw_action: sets the Comet configuration and deploys a new Comet implementation on Optimism
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Deploys and configures the Compound III protocol on Optimism via cross-chain messages
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The first proposal action sets the Comet configuration and deploys a new Comet implementation on Optimism. This sends the encoded setConfiguration and deployAndUpgradeTo calls across the bridge

claimed_actions.raw_action: calls setRewardConfig on the Optimism rewards contract
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Sets COMP as the reward token with a supply and borrow speed of 5 COMP/day
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: It also calls setRewardConfig on the Optimism rewards contract, to establish Optimism’s bridged version of COMP as the reward token for the deployment and set the initial supply speed to be 5 COMP/day and borrow speed to be 5 COMP/day.

claimed_actions.raw_action: approves Circle’s Cross-Chain Transfer Protocol (CCTP) TokenMessenger to take the Timelock's USDC
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Allows CCTP to transfer USDC from the Timelock to seed market reserves
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The second action approves Circle’s Cross-Chain Transfer Protocol (CCTP) TokenMessenger to take the Timelock's USDC on Mainnet

claimed_actions.raw_action: deposits and burns 10K USDC from mainnet via depositForBurn function
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Bridges 10K USDC to Optimism to mint native USDC to Comet
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The third action deposits and burns 10K USDC from mainnet via depositForBurn function on CCTP’s TokenMessenger contract to mint native USDC to Comet on Optimism.

claimed_actions.raw_action: approves Optimism’s L1StandardBridge to take Timelock's COMP
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Allows L1StandardBridge to transfer COMP from the Timelock to seed rewards
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The fourth action approves Optimism’s L1StandardBridge to take Timelock's COMP

claimed_actions.raw_action: deposits 3.6K COMP from mainnet to the Optimism L1StandardBridge contract
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Bridges 3.6K COMP to CometRewards on Optimism
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The fifth action deposits 3.6K COMP from mainnet to the Optimism L1StandardBridge contract to bridge to CometRewards.

claimed_actions.raw_action: updates the ENS TXT record v3-official-markets
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Updates the official list of Compound markets
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: updates the ENS TXT record v3-official-markets on v3-additional-grants.compound-community-licenses.eth

claimed_complexity.reason: Deploys a new implementation across a bridge and seeds reserves/rewards.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: This proposal initializes a Compound III USDC market (cUSDCv3) on Optimism. It deploys the Comet implementation... bridges 10K USDC... bridges 3.6K COMP

disclosed_functions.textual_evidence: sends the encoded setConfiguration and deployAndUpgradeTo calls across the bridge
sends the encoded setConfiguration and deployAndUpgradeTo calls across the bridge
It also calls setRewardConfig on the Optimism rewards contract
The third action deposits and burns 10K USDC from mainnet via depositForBurn function

limitations: Cross-chain transactions complexity might introduce implementation details omitted from summary.
